name: Het Hogeland (Netherlands)
description: A teal field bearing the municipal logo — a white 'H' monogram enclosing a stylised landscape — with the name 'gemeente Het Hogeland' beside it.
history: Flag of the municipality of Het Hogeland in the north of the province of Groningen, formed in 2019 from Bedum, De Marne, Winsum and Eemsmond. The flag is the municipality's logo/wordmark banner rather than a heraldic design.

features.role: the municipal 'H' logo and wordmark 'gemeente Het Hogeland'
